title: verbascum × sabaudum
intro: Verbascum × sabaudum, also known as Giant Mullein or Mullein Verbena, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its large, yellow flowers and tall stature. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × sabaudum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include alleviating skin conditions like eczema and acne, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Verbascum × sabaudum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
